$comment: Single source of truth for log-line regexes shared between Mithril (.NET) and downstream tools (e.g. tools/MithrilLogMcp). Each entry mirrors a [GeneratedRegex] attribute in the listed C# method; LogPatternCatalogParityTests asserts they remain identical. Adding a new pattern: add an entry here AND apply the same string to a [GeneratedRegex] attribute. Removing or editing a pattern: change both sides in the same commit.

samwise.GardenLogParser.SetPetOwnerRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 SetPetOwnerHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.AppearanceRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 AppearanceObserver. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.UpdateDescRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 UpdateDescriptionHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.StartInteractRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 StartInteractionHandler. Same root verb as arwen.FavorLogParser.StartInteractionRx, but constrained to plant targets ("Summoned*"). Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.UpdateItemCodeRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 UpdateItemCodeHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.ScreenTextErrorR.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 ScreenTextHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

samwise.GardenLogParser.PlantingCapRx.pattern: ProcessErrorMessage\(ItemUnusable,\s*"([^"]+?) can't be used: You already have the maximum of that type of plant growing"
samwise.GardenLogParser.PlantingCapRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 ErrorMessageHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

inventory.PlayerInventoryFrameProducer.D.notes: Moved from arwen.FavorLogParser to the GameState inventory folder's producer in #608. The same ProcessDeleteItem verb is also parsed by Mithril.GameState.Gifting.GiftSignalService.DeleteItemRx (Tier-2 signal service, single L1 pump) — Arwen consumes gifts via IGiftSignalService.GiftAccepted and no longer parses this verb directly.

gifting.GiftSignalService.DeleteItemRx.notes: Tier-2 signal service's own copy of the ProcessDeleteItem regex (#594 / #596). The single L1 pump correlates ProcessStartInteraction / ProcessDeleteItem / ProcessDeltaFavor on its own state machine and emits a resolved GiftAccepted with InternalName baked in (from the service's own ProcessAddItem map). Two services on separate pumps each maintain their own correlation against the same verb — by design.

smaug.VendorLogParser.VendorScreenRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 VendorScreenHandler → Npc.OnVendorScreen. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

fields.name: goldResetsAtMs
fields.notes: Unix timestamp in milliseconds; when vendor gold next resets (~24h cycle)

smaug.VendorLogParser.VendorAddItemRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 VendorAddItemHandler → Npc.OnVendorAddItem. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

smaug.VendorLogParser.VendorGoldRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 VendorGoldHandler. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

fields.name: goldResetsAtMs
fields.notes: Unix timestamp in milliseconds; when vendor gold next resets (~24h cycle)

smaug.VendorLogParser.StartInteractionRx.notes: Retired: now parsed by Arda L3 Npc.OnStartInteraction. Pattern kept for TS port parity.

pippin.GourmandLogParser.ProcessBookFood.notes: Outer match captures the full Foods Consumed report body; entries inside are extracted by FoodEntryRx after splitting on literal \n (two-char escape).

pippin.GourmandLogParser.FoodEntryRx.notes: Sub-pattern applied to each entry line of the Foods Consumed report body.

gameState.ChatChannelClassifier.ChatLine.notes: Splits a chat line into (channel, speaker, text). The classifier routes [Status]/[NPC Chatter] to drain and the rest to PlayerChat (#603).
Fallback for chat lines lacking the canonical 'Speaker:' split — bare-header system announcements. Used by the classifier when the speakered shape misses (#603).

gameState.WordOfPowerView.UpperTokenRx.notes: Match-all upper-token scanner; the WoP view validates each match against the discovery codebook before flipping state to Spent (#603).

gameState.WordOfPowerDiscoveredParser.Di.pattern: ProcessBook\("You discovered a word of power!",\s*"You've discovered a word of power: (?[A-Z]+).*?Word of Power: (?[^<]+)\\n(?.+?)\\n\\n
gameState.WordOfPowerDiscoveredParser.Di.notes: ProcessBook newlines are encoded as literal \n (backslash + n), so the pattern carries \\n. Migrated from Saruman to Mithril.GameState per #603.

legolas.PlayerLogParser.ItemCollectedRx.notes: Post-Arda: operates on the already-extracted ScreenTextObserved.Text (ImportantInfo category) rather than the full log line. Matches the inner text body only.

legolas.PlayerLogParser.MapFxRelativeOff.notes: Extracts the trailing relative-offset readout ("The X is Nm DIR and Mm DIR.") embedded in a ProcessMapFx line — the chat-mirrored directional banner PG carries inline alongside the absolute (X,Y,Z). Drives PlayerLogIngestionService's calibration verify-mode NoteSurvey hook (#606 — the chat-side SurveyRegex retired). Helper-only: pattern applied via TryParseMapFxRelativeOffset against the ProcessMapFx trailing message string, not the full line.

shared.InventoryStatusChatParser.Counted.notes: Counted form must be tried before SingleRx so 'Guava x42 added to inventory.' doesn't match with name='Guava x42'.

shared.SkillLogParser.LoadSkillsRx.notes: Guard for the full skill-table dump (login / zone-change). The per-skill rows are extracted by SkillTupleRx applied over the whole line; this entry only discriminates the line. Re-fires on zone transitions, which is what lets PlayerSkillStateService self-heal after a mid-session start. See issue #462.

shared.SkillLogParser.UpdateSkillRx.notes: Guard for a single-skill delta. The leading struct is extracted by SkillTupleRx, the XP gained by XpGainRx. Samwise consumes the Gardening delta via IPlayerSkillState.SubscribeChanges (#581) rather than re-matching this line.

shared.SkillLogParser.XpGainRx.notes: ProcessUpdateSkill's third positional = XP earned this tick. Triangulated against the authoritative chat '[Status] You earned N XP in <Skill>' line across the Player.log(UTC)/ChatLogs(local) offset (Endurance 26, Psychology 577, Anatomy_Bears 48 matched exactly) — authoritative within a level. Level-up / cap-reaching tick behaviour is unobserved (verification owed, #462); best-effort across a boundary and self-healing via the next ProcessLoadSkills. The announce bool and trailing 0,0 are still not parsed.

shared.SkillLogParser.SkillTupleRx.notes: The shared {type=,raw=,bonus=,xp=,tnl=,max=} struct grammar emitted by both ProcessLoadSkills and ProcessUpdateSkill. Applied via Matches() over the whole line: one match for an update, the full table (~125) for a snapshot. raw=Level, bonus=BonusLevels, xp=XpTowardNextLevel, tnl=XpNeededForNextLevel, max=MaxLevel (0 = non-trainable pseudo-skill; raw>=max = capped, tnl stale).

shared.RecipeLogParser.LoadRecipesRx.notes: Guard for the full known-recipe dump (login / zone-change). The two parallel [ids],[counts] arrays are extracted by LoadRecipesPayloadRx; this entry only discriminates the line. Re-fires on zone transitions, which is what lets PlayerRecipeStateService self-heal after a mid-session start and makes the export's recipe half fully eliminable. See issue #473.

shared.RecipeLogParser.UpdateRecipeRx.notes: Guard for a single-recipe delta. The (id, count) payload is extracted by UpdateRecipePayloadRx. count==0 for a previously-unknown recipe is a learn (the discrete signal with no skill analogue; PG emits no separate learn/first-time verb); count>=1 is the new absolute craft-completion total (verified live: not a delta).

shared.RecipeLogParser.LoadRecipesPayloa.notes: The two parallel, equal-length integer arrays of ProcessLoadRecipes: ids (recipe_<id> in recipes.json) zipped with lifetime completion counts (0 = known but never crafted). Lists carry a trailing comma; split with empty-entry removal. A length mismatch or empty payload is treated as degenerate and yields no event (don't wipe live state).

shared.RecipeLogParser.UpdateRecipePaylo.notes: ProcessUpdateRecipe(id, count): id = recipe_<id>; count = the new ABSOLUTE lifetime completion count for this character (verified live — snapshot 255 → ProcessUpdateRecipe(7026,256) → next snapshot 256, not a delta). 0 = just-learned.

shared.ActiveCharacterLogSynchronizer.Ad.notes: Retired from C# — ActiveCharacterLogSynchronizer now consumes Arda SessionStarted events directly. Pattern retained for reference; session seeding is handled by Arda.Ingest source coordinators.

sessionMarker.notes: Session-start scan literal and chunk size. Used by Arda.Ingest source coordinators to seed replay from the last login.

playerLogTimestampPrefix.notes: Per-line timestamp; date is inferred from file mtime or the most recent dated header line.
